import axios from'axios';const axiosClient=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:8080/api/v1',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});axiosClient.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}// Temporary fix for MVP decoupled microservices
const userStr=localStorage.getItem('user');if(userStr){const user=JSON.parse(userStr);config.headers['X-User-Id']=user.id;}return config;});export default axiosClient;
